recommendations.overview: A teenage girl living in Baltimore in the early 1960s dreams of appearing on a popular TV dance show.

recommendations.title: Boys
recommendations.overview: Two teen track stars discover first love as they train for the biggest relay race of their young lives.

recommendations.title: God Bless America
recommendations.overview: Fed up with the cruelty and stupidity of American culture, an unlikely duo goes on a killing spree, killing reality TV stars, bigots and others they find repugnant.

recommendations.title: Brigsby Bear
recommendations.overview: Brigsby Bear Adventures is a children's TV show produced for an audience of one: James. When the show abruptly ends, James's life changes forever, and he sets out to finish the story himself.

recommendations.title: Courted
recommendations.overview: When a feared judge of the French court, Xavier Racine, encounters a French-Danish juror, Ditte Lorensen-Coteret, at a murder trial, their shared past is slowly uncovered.

recommendations.title: Rifkin’s Festival

recommendations.title: Scooby Goes Hollywood
recommendations.overview: Shaggy and Scooby-Doo quit their Saturday morning TV series in pursuit of Hollywood stardom.

recommendations.title: Live!
recommendations.overview: A mockumentary following an ambitious TV network executive trying to produce a controversial reality show where contestants play Russian Roulette.

recommendations.title: The Rutles: All You Need Is Cash
recommendations.overview: The story of the rise and fall of the Pre-Fab Four.
